name: Ceris ~Matriarch Wounded~
description:
"I say we challenge this fate!"

You are and Enderman/Enderkin, fighting against the Nether hoard. You keep fighting for what feels like ages, but stop after you hear a large explosion. You glanced over to see your commander and rule, Ceris, getting beat up by Inferous. You threw him off the void, freeing her. She is bloody and bruised up, telling you to help your army and leave her. What do you do?

Discord
